about:
## About Us
Core Dev is the engineering backbone of the Powerhouse ecosystem. We build and maintain the foundational infrastructure that powers decentralized operations — from document model runtimes and reactor engines to the developer SDK and CLI tooling.

## What We Do
Our team focuses on the deep technical work that makes the Powerhouse platform reliable, performant, and extensible. We own the core protocol layer, ensuring that document models, reducers, and operations work correctly and efficiently at scale.

## Core Infrastructure
We design and implement the runtime systems that power Powerhouse document processing — including the reactor architecture, synchronization protocols, and the document-model framework that enables type-safe, deterministic state management.

## Developer Experience
We build the tools that other teams rely on: the Powerhouse CLI, code generation pipelines, SDK libraries, and development environment integrations. Our goal is to make building on Powerhouse as productive and enjoyable as possible.

## Platform Reliability
We ensure the platform is robust, well-tested, and secure. This includes continuous integration pipelines, automated testing infrastructure, performance monitoring, and security audits across the stack.
description: Core Dev is a team focused on building and maintaining the core infrastructure, protocols, and developer tooling for the Powerhouse ecosystem
name: Core Dev
